description: Jittered strip plot of 2025 SPG scores for the 183 Western-region schools, one dot per school in four locale columns (City, Suburb, Town, Rural). Locale runs along the horizontal axis; the SPG score runs up the vertical axis, with dots jittered across the middle of each locale column — leaving a clear gap between columns — so clusters, gaps, outliers, and each group's true size stay visible. The score spreads overlap heavily across locales.

title.text: SPG scores spread widely within every Western locale, and the locales overlap
title.subtitle: 2025 SPG score of each Western-region school (n = 183), one dot per school, jittered within locale columns — sparse groups show their true size.

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI public accountability data (School Performance Grades), 2025. Style-guide demo.
